title: v1 invoke request (synchronous-only)
description: Request body a host sends to a plugin action to invoke it under contract_version 1 (docs/plugin-system/README.md §7, docs/plugin-system/phase1-implementation.md §6.2). Synchronous-only: the plugin is expected to compute the final result and return it directly as the HTTP response (see invoke-response.schema.json), with no deferred completion event or operation status polling. This is the host's own data-export payload (reused from the host's export feature, not a new opaque envelope): tree is the exported content tree and is intentionally open-ended so the export format can gain fields over time (docs/plugin-system/README.md §7: 'contract_version 单调递增；平台保证同一大版本内只增字段不删改').

contract_version.description: Fixed to 1 for the synchronous-only contract.
